chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-735 of 2023 (Mst. Nadir Mangrio Vs. The State & others) 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No. 6100/2023. 02-11-2023. Mr. Ghulam Mujtab Jakhar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Mujahid Hussain Phulpoto, advocate for the private respondents. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy P.G for the State. >>>>>>>...<<<<<<<< 1. Over ruled. 2 & 3. Baby Urooj is brought by her father Naveed Ahmed. As per him she was deserted by the applicant herself. Be that as it may the custody of the baby is handed over to the applicant being her mother simply for the reason that she being 04 months old is on breast feeding. The parties however, may approach the guardian Court having jurisdiction for regulating the custody of the minor baby in accordance with law, if so is advised to them. Instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 491 Cr.P.C is disposed of accordingly together with listed application. J U D G E Nasim/P.A. 2
